text: There is a curious buzz in the air as I drift between sharply lit glass-walled rooms and the bold, inviting designs of an exhibit about research and development. The world feels like it’s balancing on the edge of something—knowledge just glimpsed, futures just conceived. I feel alert, speculative, a little out of place but drawn forward by a quiet sense of optimism and desire to learn. I want to linger and let thoughts unfold, watching how humans shape and are shaped by their surroundings.
